message:
feat(c-api): temporary database lifecycle, finalize error propagation, VDBE result code parsing

Implement three interrelated improvements to the C API compatibility layer:

1. Temporary database support for sqlite3_open(""):
   - Add OpenTarget enum (Path vs Temporary) and reserve_temporary_database_path()
     that atomically creates a unique temp file using PID + timestamp + counter
   - Store temporary path in Sqlite3.temporary_path field
   - On sqlite3_close, call cleanup_temporary_database_artifacts() which removes
     the database file and all sidecar files (-journal, -wal, -shm)
   - On open failure or panic, clean up the reserved temp file
   - Add test verifying sidecar cleanup and file lifecycle

2. sqlite3_finalize now returns the last error code:
   - Previously always returned SQLITE_OK regardless of prior step errors
   - Now returns last_step_code from the statement (SQLITE_ROW and SQLITE_DONE
     map back to SQLITE_OK per real SQLite semantics)
   - Add test verifying SQLITE_CONSTRAINT propagation through finalize

3. VDBE result code extraction from error messages:
   - New parse_embedded_vdbe_result_code() extracts numeric result codes from
     FrankenError::Internal messages prefixed with "VDBE halted with code "
   - Allows error_to_code to return precise SQLite error codes (e.g.,
     SQLITE_CONSTRAINT) instead of generic SQLITE_ERROR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
